description: First-run onboarding page (www/index.html) in the main window. Grants the bundled page the onboarding app-commands: trigger the mic permission prompt, peek at recent local clips for the 'what TwinMe noticed' demo, and enable context capture (settings_set_paused reused). No remote origin is involved (no remote.urls), so this is local-only — once index.html redirects to https://twinme.me the remote capabilities take over.
